title: Raw data supporting Identifying invertebrates from pitfall, flight interception traps and hand collecting
author: Rees, Helen C
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Raw data supporting identifying invertebrates from pitfall, flight interception traps and hand collecting: comparing metabarcoding with traditional methods. 

 Two step PCRs were performed on each sample replicate using modified primers mICOIintF and jgHCO2198 followed by the Nextera XT index kit v2 Set A (Illumina). 

 The pool was loaded onto an illumina MiSeq using a MiSeq Reagent Kit v2 500 cycle kit (Illumina), with 10% Phi-X to generate 250-bp paired-end reads.
steps_raw:

keywords: bioinformatic processing, Coleoptera, flight interception traps, high throughput sequencing, invertebrates, metabarcoding, pitfall traps, taxonomic identification
